tests.name: 011 opaque procs
tests.todoDesc: The point of an [opaque] proc is to have to highlight it as opaque because you're intentionally calling Koru-events FROM a Koru-event, breaking the flow. This has performance implications, and is almost ALWAYS mechanically refactoringable to returning to the calling flow, making the code easier to optimize.
